What We Do

Professional Detailing Services

We come to you — wherever you are in the Vaughan area. No need to drop your car off anywhere.

🚗
Full Interior Detail

Deep vacuum, wipe-down of all surfaces, door panels, console, cup holders, and a thorough interior clean that makes your car feel brand new.

✨
Exterior Hand Wash

Careful hand wash of the full exterior, rims, wheel wells, door jambs, and windows — finished with a streak-free shine.

🔥
Full Interior + Exterior

The complete package — interior detail combined with a full exterior hand wash. Best value, best result. First-time customers get the exterior wash on us.

🛻
Trucks & Sprinters

Specialized detailing for larger vehicles including pickup trucks, cargo vans, and Sprinters. Priced to reflect the extra size and time.

📍
Mobile — We Come to You

We bring all our equipment straight to your home, office, or wherever is most convenient for you in the Vaughan and GTA area.

⏱️
Fast Turnaround

Most details are completed in 1–4 hours depending on vehicle size and package selected. Efficient, thorough, and on your schedule.

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

🎁

First Time Customer Promo

Exterior hand wash is included FREE with all packages for first-time customers.

Schedule Your Detail

Book an Appointment

Max 2 bookings per day. We'll confirm your appointment within a few hours.

How It Works

Fill out the form, choose your preferred date and payment method, and we'll reach out to confirm. We come to you — no drop-off needed.

  • 📍 We come to your location in Vaughan & GTA
  • ⏱️ 1–4 hours depending on vehicle & package
  • 📅 Max 2 bookings per day
  • 💳 Pay online (e-transfer) or in person
  • 📞 Confirmed via call/text at 647-906-1701
  • ✉️ Or email detailers.tm@gmail.com
